title: Sandwich
subTitle: Sher Singh has two wives, Nisha and Sweety, and juggles his time between them. However, when his two wives cross paths, his troubles increase manifold leading to hilarious situations.

title: Dance Party
subTitle: Sweety is in love with Sanjay, the son of rich businessman Rajaram. However, she is heartbroken when she sees his true colours at a party where he is under the influence of alcohol.

title: Awarapan
subTitle: A hitman sets out to rescue his boss's mistress and send her back to her boyfriend after learning that she is a victim of sex trafficking.

title: Filler
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Platform
subTitle: Vikram and Raju are brothers who work in a restaurant. When a conniving person frames Vikram in a murder case and separates them, circumstances lead Raju to a life of crime.

title: Maharaja
subTitle: Prince Kohinoor returns home after twenty years only to discover that Ranbir Singh, his parents' killer, still holds control. Subsequently, he decides to defeat him to protect his loved ones.

title: Hamara Dil Aapke Paas Hai
subTitle: When Preeti stands up against a murderer in court, she suffers a devastating consequence. Later, after being rejected by her loved ones, she finds shelter and support in an empathetic stranger.

title: The Hero: Love Story of a Spy
subTitle: Arun Khanna, an Indian spy, collaborates with Reshma to stop a nuclear attack. However, Reshma's identity is compromised during her undercover mission in Pakistan.

title: Insaaf Ki Pukar
subTitle: When a dishonest officer destroys their lives, two men unite to fight corruption, facing danger as they strive to restore honour and peace.

title: Don
subTitle: Don, a wanted criminal, succumbs to his injuries in a police chase. Things take a turn when Vijay, a lookalike of Don, replaces him and tries to trace the details of his illegal activities.

title: Angaaray
subTitle: While working undercover to take down a gang of killers, a hotshot policeman runs into his childhood friends, who have gone far too long down the criminal path.

title: Angaaray
subTitle: While working undercover to take down a gang of killers, a hotshot policeman runs into his childhood friends, who have gone far too long down the criminal path.

title: Chamku
subTitle: Chandrama is adopted by a Naxal leader and grows up to be a Naxalite. However, when his adoptive father is killed, he is forced to become a police assassin and later, falls in love with Shubhi.

title: Barsaat
subTitle: Badal, a simple village boy, falls for his classmate Tina. However, Tina's father does not approve of their relationship and conspires to separate them.

title: Anari No. 1
subTitle: Raja, a waiter, and his girlfriend, Sapna, hatch a plan to kidnap Rahul, a rich man who is Raja's lookalike. But things go awry when Raja gets trapped in his own plan.

title: King Uncle
subTitle: Ashok, an austere man, experiences a profound shift in his life when an orphan girl enters his world, infusing it with warmth and meaning that he had long forgotten.

title: Bulandi
subTitle: Dharamraj Thakur, the head of a village, is highly respected by the villagers, However, his dignity is at stake when his younger brother, Arjun, is accused of raping a school teacher.

title: Jaanwar
subTitle: A criminal changes the course of his life when he decides to raise a baby who has survived a train crash, but chaos ensues when his past begins to haunt him.

title: Dabangg 2
subTitle: Inspector Chulbul Pandey oversees the operations of the local police station in Kanpur. However, things take a turn when he kills the brother of a local politician.

title: Karma
subTitle: Accompanied by a troubled trio of prisoners, a high-ranking law enforcement officer sets out to avenge the miseries inflicted upon his family by an anti-national group.

title: Jodidar
subTitle: Ganesh, an elephant, watches his master being killed by three poachers. After many years, Ganesh can identify the killers while being in the service of a new master, Munna.

title: Jodidar
subTitle: Ganesh, an elephant, watches his master being killed by three poachers. After many years, Ganesh can identify the killers while being in the service of a new master, Munna.

title: Rehnaa Hai Terre Dil Mein
subTitle: Maddy has seven days to win Reena's affections before she finds out that he is not Rajeev, the childhood friend and prospective fiance she has been expecting.

title: Aag Se Khelenge
subTitle: While trying to arrest a gangster, a police officer joins hands with Johnny, one of the gangster's men who claims to be an undercover police officer himself.

title: Dadagiri
subTitle: A quarrel arises between Goddess Lakshmi and Lord Vishnu resulting in them meddling in the lives of a settlement broker and a taxi driver.

title: Toofan
subTitle: Separated at birth, the paths of Shyam, a lousy magician unwittingly roped into a crime, and Toofan, a defender of the people, cross again years later as they reunite to avenge their father.

title: Krishna
subTitle: The life of Sunil, an aspiring pilot, takes a disastrous turn when he is falsely convicted for a crime he did not commit.

title: Ram Lakhan
subTitle: Ram, an upright police officer, and his brother Lakhan, a playboy, vow vengeance when they learn that their father was killed by two wicked tricksters.

title: Mr. & Mrs. Khiladi
subTitle: When stars misalign, love blossoms between an astrology-obsessed idler and a headstrong fish heiress whose father will settle for nothing less than a hardworking son-in-law.

title: Laadla
subTitle: Raju, an upright union leader, can do anything at his wheelchair-bound mother's behest, even if it means breaking his own heart and giving in to a rude heiress.

title: Dacait
subTitle: After being mercilessly beaten and abandoned to die, a young man is rescued by a band of dacoits, who nurse him back to health in their hidden lair.
